# 0usia

> 0usia is an interdisciplinary vision studio led by Kuba Wójcik, working with founders, operators, and creators to build ventures with substance.

## What We Do

We operate across five disciplines — Strategy, Communication, Community, Operations, and Function — held in harmony and applied to each engagement as needed.

- **Strategy**: We establish the foundational thesis of a venture — what it is, who it is for, and the precise conditions under which it wins. Deliverables include strategic positioning, business model design, and roadmap & KPI frameworks.
- **Communication**: We find the exact form in which a venture's truth becomes visible to its audience. This includes brand philosophy, voice and tone, messaging, and creative production (copy, film, photography).
- **Community**: We shape the conditions under which teams align, audiences gather, and participants become advocates. This covers founder and team analysis, decision frameworks, and community-led go-to-market.
- **Operations**: We audit existing practices and design better systems — ones that automate intelligently, scale the business, and are built to be genuinely used. Deliverables include process design, systems and automation, and workflow architecture.
- **Function**: We develop the specific features, moves, and evolutions that expand reach, deepen service, and strengthen participation in communities. This includes product strategy, UX/UI design systems, and feature development.

## How We Work

Engagements are structured as equity partnerships, scoped projects, or ongoing retainers — matched to the stage and nature of the venture. Every engagement is a partnership.

## Who We Are

Led by Jakub (Kuba) Wójcik — a founder, operator, and creative with experience across consumer products, marketplaces, arts, and technology ventures.

## Selected Ventures

- **Libelo** — nature exploration and adventure travel platform (active, profit-generating)
- **Violca** — cycling apparel and adventure community (active)
- **Substans** — arts-performance collective, Berlin (active)
- **Objects Gallery** — curated design objects marketplace (active)
- **Fix** — facility management marketplace (acquired/sold)
- **ChokoSol** — artisan small-batch chocolate (active)
- **Dominik Lejman** — portfolio of contemporary artist (active)
- **Wojcistics** — land transport distribution (discontinued)
